steps.text: The summoned shinobi are gone. Naruto draws on the mountain's natural energy — Sage Mode. Sasuke's cursed chakra coils into wings of shadow.

steps.speaker: Sasuke
steps.text: This ends here. The world is broken, Naruto. I'll burn the old ways down and build something stronger.

steps.speaker: Naruto
steps.text: You're not building anything. You're just destroying the only thing that ever mattered. You're alone — and I won't let you stay that way!

steps.speaker: Sasuke
steps.text: Then stop me. RASENGAN against CHIDORI — let's see whose resolve is real.

boss.victory_text: Rasengan and Chidori collide. The valley goes white...
